title: Multi-Step Arithmetic Chain Dataset with Parameterized Difficulty
summary: Demo notebook for the Multi-Step Arithmetic Chain Dataset. Loads 24 curated examples (one per difficulty level 2-25) from a synthetic dataset of multi-step arithmetic problems. The notebook replicates the data.py transformation pipeline: loading raw data, converting to exp_sel_data_out schema with metadata_ prefixed fields, validating structure, and displaying results. Includes a summary table of all examples and 4-panel visualization showing answer magnitude vs difficulty, operation frequency distribution, intermediate value spread, and difficulty level distribution.
